default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on new article format and refine content guardrails.](https://fathom.video/share/wnkNVFUnBd7XkzQ-hfvRP6WziPycVTet?tab=summary&timestamp=24.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New articles will feature a "Key Takeaways" summary for SEO and user experience, replacing the internal "TLDR" label.](https://fathom.video/share/wnkNVFUnBd7XkzQ-hfvRP6WziPycVTet?tab=summary&timestamp=77.0)
  - [Content must use soft language ("typically," "generally") to avoid guaranteeing specific expert credentials (e.g., ACTAR) or experience (e.g., prior testimony), which could be used against Rimkus in litigation.](https://fathom.video/share/wnkNVFUnBd7XkzQ-hfvRP6WziPycVTet?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
  - [Jennifer will draft standard language for the promotional outro to ensure compliance with these guardrails.](https://fathom.video/share/wnkNVFUnBd7XkzQ-hfvRP6WziPycVTet?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
  - [The "construction" topic scope will expand to include all sub-services under the "Global Energy Services" group (e.g., renewables, oil & gas).](https://fathom.video/share/wnkNVFUnBd7XkzQ-hfvRP6WziPycVTet?tab=summary&timestamp=867.0)

## Topics

### New Article Format

  - [New articles will include a "Key Takeaways" summary after the intro.](https://fathom.video/share/wnkNVFUnBd7XkzQ-hfvRP6WziPycVTet?tab=summary&timestamp=77.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Improves SEO by directly answering user intent and enhances readability.](https://fathom.video/share/wnkNVFUnBd7XkzQ-hfvRP6WziPycVTet?tab=summary&timestamp=77.0)
      - [**Label:** Changed from "TLDR" to "Key Takeaways" for a more professional tone.](https://fathom.video/share/wnkNVFUnBd7XkzQ-hfvRP6WziPycVTet?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
  - [A call-to-action (CTA) within the summary is optional; Jennifer will decide on its inclusion.](https://fathom.video/share/wnkNVFUnBd7XkzQ-hfvRP6WziPycVTet?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)

### Content Guardrails & Refinements

  - [**Guarding Against Litigation Risk:** Content must use soft, non-guaranteeing language to prevent opposing counsel from using it to challenge Rimkus's expert qualifications in court.](https://fathom.video/share/wnkNVFUnBd7XkzQ-hfvRP6WziPycVTet?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
      - [**Credential Example (ACTAR):**](https://fathom.video/share/wnkNVFUnBd7XkzQ-hfvRP6WziPycVTet?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
          - [**Problem:** Stating all experts are ACTAR-certified is inaccurate, as some qualified experts (e.g., mechanical engineers) may lack it.](https://fathom.video/share/wnkNVFUnBd7XkzQ-hfvRP6WziPycVTet?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)
          - [**Solution:** Use soft phrasing like, "Our team includes ACTAR-accredited specialists."](https://fathom.video/share/wnkNVFUnBd7XkzQ-hfvRP6WziPycVTet?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)
      - [**Experience Example (Testimony):**](https://fathom.video/share/wnkNVFUnBd7XkzQ-hfvRP6WziPycVTet?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)
          - [**Problem:** Stating all experts have prior courtroom experience is inaccurate, as new hires may not.](https://fathom.video/share/wnkNVFUnBd7XkzQ-hfvRP6WziPycVTet?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)
          - [**Solution:** Focus on Rimkus's preparation process (e.g., mock cross-examinations) rather than guaranteeing prior experience.](https://fathom.video/share/wnkNVFUnBd7XkzQ-hfvRP6WziPycVTet?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
  - [**Action:** Jennifer will draft standard language for the promotional outro to serve as a template for all future articles.](https://fathom.video/share/wnkNVFUnBd7XkzQ-hfvRP6WziPycVTet?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)

### Topic Scope & Attribution

  - [**"Hydrogen Embrittlement" Article:**](https://fathom.video/share/wnkNVFUnBd7XkzQ-hfvRP6WziPycVTet?tab=summary&timestamp=703.0)
      - [**Context:** This is a refresh of a technical article by a current Rimkus expert, Alan Conway.](https://fathom.video/share/wnkNVFUnBd7XkzQ-hfvRP6WziPycVTet?tab=summary&timestamp=703.0)
      - [**Action:** Jennifer will send the draft to Conway for review. If approved, he will be credited as the author.](https://fathom.video/share/wnkNVFUnBd7XkzQ-hfvRP6WziPycVTet?tab=summary&timestamp=703.0)
      - [**Strategy:** This refresh targets a high-volume keyword. An alternative strategy is to create a new, top-funnel article for the keyword while keeping the original technical piece.](https://fathom.video/share/wnkNVFUnBd7XkzQ-hfvRP6WziPycVTet?tab=summary&timestamp=770.0)
  - [**"Construction" Topic Scope:**](https://fathom.video/share/wnkNVFUnBd7XkzQ-hfvRP6WziPycVTet?tab=summary&timestamp=867.0)
      - [**Problem:** The current scope is too narrow, missing key services.](https://fathom.video/share/wnkNVFUnBd7XkzQ-hfvRP6WziPycVTet?tab=summary&timestamp=867.0)
      - [**Clarification:** "Construction" is a sub-service under the "Global Energy Services" group, which also includes renewables and oil & gas.](https://fathom.video/share/wnkNVFUnBd7XkzQ-hfvRP6WziPycVTet?tab=summary&timestamp=867.0)
      - [**Action:** Jennifer will provide updated materials to expand the topic scope.](https://fathom.video/share/wnkNVFUnBd7XkzQ-hfvRP6WziPycVTet?tab=summary&timestamp=929.0)

### Conversion Tracking Status

  - [**Status:** Not actively tracked.](https://fathom.video/share/wnkNVFUnBd7XkzQ-hfvRP6WziPycVTet?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)
  - [**Reason:** A CRM re-evaluation and other website priorities are delaying implementation.](https://fathom.video/share/wnkNVFUnBd7XkzQ-hfvRP6WziPycVTet?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)
  - [**Current Focus:** LLM prompts, visibility, and citations.](https://fathom.video/share/wnkNVFUnBd7XkzQ-hfvRP6WziPycVTet?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
  - [**Offer:** GrowthX can assist with future setup.](https://fathom.video/share/wnkNVFUnBd7XkzQ-hfvRP6WziPycVTet?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jennifer:**](https://fathom.video/share/wnkNVFUnBd7XkzQ-hfvRP6WziPycVTet?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
      - [Review new articles, changing the summary label to "Key Takeaways."](https://fathom.video/share/wnkNVFUnBd7XkzQ-hfvRP6WziPycVTet?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
      - [Draft standard promotional language for the article outro, adhering to the new guardrails.](https://fathom.video/share/wnkNVFUnBd7XkzQ-hfvRP6WziPycVTet?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
      - [Send the "Hydrogen Embrittlement" draft to Alan Conway for review.](https://fathom.video/share/wnkNVFUnBd7XkzQ-hfvRP6WziPycVTet?tab=summary&timestamp=703.0)
      - [Provide updated materials to expand the "construction" topic scope.](https://fathom.video/share/wnkNVFUnBd7XkzQ-hfvRP6WziPycVTet?tab=summary&timestamp=929.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/wnkNVFUnBd7XkzQ-hfvRP6WziPycVTet?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
      - [Implement the "Key Takeaways" label and new outro language in all future articles.](https://fathom.video/share/wnkNVFUnBd7XkzQ-hfvRP6WziPycVTet?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
      - [Flag articles for Jennifer that may require expert review.](https://fathom.video/share/wnkNVFUnBd7XkzQ-hfvRP6WziPycVTet?tab=summary&timestamp=751.0)

action_items.description: Draft and share standard CTA/outro for forensics articles w/ Jen; then implement across drafts
Change TLDR to Key Takeaways in forensics drafts
Email Jen weekly list of topics/drafts; flag expert-authored pieces
Flag hydrogen embrittlement refresh to Jen; then she reviews and decides send to Alan Conway
Send updated Global Energy Services/construction materials to Matt; then GrowthX propose expanded topics
